category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Nepal NBSM NS certification, energy programmes, and IEC 60335-2-24 safety requirements.

title.en: China-to-Nepal Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入尼泊尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入尼泊爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Nepal market-access requirements: NBSM (Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology) NS certification, NS/IEC 60335-2-24 electrical safety, energy programmes, R-600a refrigerant handling, NTA radio approval for connected models, and the in-country importer route via Indian ports.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与尼泊尔市场准入要求差距对照：NBSM（尼泊尔标准与计量局）NS认证、NS/IEC 60335-2-24电气安全、能效计划、R-600a制冷剂处理、联网型号的NTA无线电核准，以及经由印度港口的在地进口商路径。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與尼泊爾市場准入要求差距對照：NBSM（尼泊爾標準與計量局）NS認證、NS/IEC 60335-2-24電氣安全、能效計畫、R-600a製冷劑處理、聯網型號的NTA無線電核准，以及經由印度港口的在地進口商路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Nepal legislation, NBSM NS standards and certification scope, energy-programme requirements, NTA radio rules, and import procedures with qualified professionals and the in-country importer before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及在地进口商核验现行尼泊尔法律、NBSM NS标准及认证范围、能效计划要求、NTA无线电规则及进口程序。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及在地進口商核驗現行尼泊爾法律、NBSM NS標準及認證範圍、能效計畫要求、NTA無線電規則及進口程序。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers exporting to Nepal face a market-access structure centred on the Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM): (1) electrical safety should follow NS/IEC 60335-2-24 — Nepal adopts IEC text as NS standards, so Chinese GB 4706.13 (also IEC 60335-2-24-derived) is technically close but CCC certificates are not accepted; NBSM NS conformity is required where the product is regulated; (2) energy performance is addressed through Nepal energy programmes rather than an EU-style Ecodesign/EPREL regime, and Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not map onto Nepal labels; (3) R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned, governed at appliance level via the adopted IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant annex rather than an EU-style F-Gas Regulation; (4) connected models need NTA type approval for radio; and (5) an in-country Nepali importer/representative is required, with goods routed via Indian ports (Kolkata/Vizag) as Nepal is landlocked. Nepal does not operate EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regimes.
answer_first.zh: 出口尼泊尔的中国家用电冰箱制造商面对的市场准入结构以尼泊尔标准与计量局（NBSM）为核心：（1）电气安全宜遵循NS/IEC 60335-2-24——尼泊尔将IEC文本采纳为NS标准，故中国GB 4706.13（亦源自IEC 60335-2-24）技术上相近，但CCC证书不被接受；产品受监管时须取得NBSM NS符合性；（2）能效通过尼泊尔能效计划处理，而非欧盟式生态设计/EPREL制度，且中国GB 12021.2等级无法对应尼泊尔标识；（3）R-600a制冷剂条件良好，在器具层面通过采纳的IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂附件管理，而非欧盟式氟气体法规；（4）联网型号须取得NTA无线电型号核准；（5）须设在地尼泊尔进口商/代表，因尼泊尔为内陆国，货物经印度港口（加尔各答/维沙卡帕特南）转运。尼泊尔不设欧盟式横向RoHS、电池或户外噪声制度。
answer_first.zht: 出口尼泊爾的中國家用電冰箱製造商面對的市場准入結構以尼泊爾標準與計量局（NBSM）為核心：（1）電氣安全宜遵循NS/IEC 60335-2-24——尼泊爾將IEC文本採納為NS標準，故中國GB 4706.13（亦源自IEC 60335-2-24）技術上相近，但CCC證書不被接受；產品受監管時須取得NBSM NS符合性；（2）能效通過尼泊爾能效計畫處理，而非歐盟式生態設計/EPREL制度，且中國GB 12021.2等級無法對應尼泊爾標識；（3）R-600a製冷劑條件良好，在器具層面通過採納的IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑附件管理，而非歐盟式氟氣體法規；（4）聯網型號須取得NTA無線電型號核准；（5）須設在地尼泊爾進口商/代表，因尼泊爾為內陸國，貨物經印度港口（加爾各答/維沙卡帕特南）轉運。尼泊爾不設歐盟式橫向RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲制度。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon NBSM NS standard adoption, energy-programme, NTA, or import-procedure change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
